creator: sethk@meowfishies.com
text:
# This is a shell archive.  Save it in a file, remove anything before
# this line, and then unpack it by entering "sh file".  Note, it may
# create directories; files and directories will be owned by you and
# have default permissions.
#
# This archive contains:
#
#	audio/chordpack
#	audio/chordpack/pkg-comment
#	audio/chordpack/Makefile
#	audio/chordpack/files
#	audio/chordpack/files/patch-chordpack
#	audio/chordpack/pkg-descr
#	audio/chordpack/pkg-plist
#	audio/chordpack/distinfo
#
echo c - audio/chordpack
mkdir -p audio/chordpack > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - audio/chordpack/pkg-comment
sed 's/^X//' >audio/chordpack/pkg-comment << 'END-of-audio/chordpack/pkg-comment'
XScript to convert ChordPro files to HTML, ASCII, and TeX
END-of-audio/chordpack/pkg-comment
echo x - audio/chordpack/Makefile
sed 's/^X//' >audio/chordpack/Makefile << 'END-of-audio/chordpack/Makefile'
X# New ports collection makefile for:	chordpack
X# Date created:		July 8, 2001
X# Whom:			sethk
X#
X# $FreeBSD$
X#
X
XPORTNAME=	chordpack
XPORTVERSION=	0.8.0
XCATEGORIES=	audio
XMASTER_SITES=	http://sweb.cz/dan.polansky/chordpack/
XEXTRACT_SUFX=	.tgz
X
XMAINTAINER=	sethk@meowfishies.com
X
XNO_WRKSUBDIR=	true
XNO_BUILD=	true
X
Xdo-install:
X	${INSTALL_SCRIPT} ${WRKDIR}/chordpack ${PREFIX}/bin
X	[ -d ${PREFIX}/share/emacs/site-lisp ] ||   \
X		${MKDIR} ${MKDIR}/share/emacs/site-lisp
X	${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKDIR}/chordpro-mode.el  \
X		${PREFIX}/share/emacs/site-lisp
X	[ -d ${PREFIX}/share/doc/chordpack ] ||	\
X		${MKDIR} ${PREFIX}/share/doc/chordpack
X	${INSTALL_MAN} ${WRKDIR}/chordpack-documentation.html	\
X		${PREFIX}/share/doc/chordpack
X
X.include <bsd.port.mk>
END-of-audio/chordpack/Makefile
echo c - audio/chordpack/files
mkdir -p audio/chordpack/files > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - audio/chordpack/files/patch-chordpack
sed 's/^X//' >audio/chordpack/files/patch-chordpack << 'END-of-audio/chordpack/files/patch-chordpack'
X--- chordpack.orig	Sun Jul  8 01:09:29 2001
X+++ chordpack	Sun Jul  8 01:09:32 2001
X@@ -1590,7 +1590,7 @@
X 
X         # {{{  Comment (programmer's kind of)
X         if (/^\x23/) {    # \x23 is  hash
X-            next LINE; }
X+            next; }
X         # }}}
X         # {{{  Chord instructions
X         if (/\[[^:]/) {
END-of-audio/chordpack/files/patch-chordpack
echo x - audio/chordpack/pkg-descr
sed 's/^X//' >audio/chordpack/pkg-descr << 'END-of-audio/chordpack/pkg-descr'
XThis a PERL script that converts ChordPro files (.chopro) to a more
Xreadable output format, including HTML, ASCII, and TeX.
X
XWWW: http://sweb.cz/dan.polansky/chordpack/
X
X- Seth
Xsethk@meowfishies.com
END-of-audio/chordpack/pkg-descr
echo x - audio/chordpack/pkg-plist
sed 's/^X//' >audio/chordpack/pkg-plist << 'END-of-audio/chordpack/pkg-plist'
Xbin/chordpack
Xshare/emacs/site-lisp/chordpro-mode.el
Xshare/doc/chordpack/chordpack-documentation.html
X@dirrm share/doc/chordpack
END-of-audio/chordpack/pkg-plist
echo x - audio/chordpack/distinfo
sed 's/^X//' >audio/chordpack/distinfo << 'END-of-audio/chordpack/distinfo'
XMD5 (chordpack-0.8.0.tgz) = 1b2cbe78a7e8e5a5cddbb09bacfbc4e8
END-of-audio/chordpack/distinfo
exit
